nasb.text: So he went after the man of God and found him sitting under an oak; and he said to him, “Are you the man of God who came from Judah?” And he said, “I am.”

esv.text: And he went after the man of God and found him sitting under an oak. And he said to him, “Are you the man of God who came from Judah?” And he said, “I am.”

cnv.text: 去追趕神人，遇見他正坐在橡樹底下，就問他：“你是從猶大來的神人嗎？”他回答：“是的！”
